_doc: Save this as `.mcp.json` at your project root. Claude Code will discover it on next launch. The hosted instance at https://emem.dev/mcp is HTTPS-only. Either the Streamable-HTTP MCP transport (preferred, Claude Code recent — the `type: "http"` field below names the MCP transport per spec; the URL itself is HTTPS) or the stdio bridge below works.

emem_via_remote._doc: Fallback for environments that need a stdio bridge — install `mcp-remote` first: `npm install -g mcp-remote`
